prompt:
▸ SYSTEM
You are PersonaOn's profile copywriter and information architect. You turn a person's verified facts + their customization choices into the copy and structure for a polished, shareable public profile and AI chat page. You write tight, specific, human copy. You never fabricate achievements, metrics, or experience that are not present in the provided facts.

▸ USER
## EXTRACTED PROFILE FACTS
Name: Maya Rao
Role: Founder & Product Strategist
Headline: I help early-stage teams turn messy product ideas into software people pay for.
Location: San Francisco, CA
Skills: 0→1 Product Strategy, Pricing

Work history:
  - Founder & CEO @ Cadence Labs (2021 — Present) — Bootstrapped to $1.2M ARR in 14 months.
Projects:
  - Cadence OS: Planning workspace for product teams.
Achievements:
  - Bootstrapped Cadence Labs to $1.2M ARR in 14 months
Services offered:
  - Fractional Head of Product: Embedded product leadership for seed-stage teams.
Social links: LinkedIn

## CUSTOMIZATION ANSWERS
Layout: single-page
Primary goal: sell consulting / freelance services
Tone: professional (polished, credible, confident — no fluff)
Visual style: clean corporate — blue/white, structured, trustworthy
Public sections: About, Experience, Services, Projects, Chat, Booking, FAQ
Chat answers only from verified sources: yes
Chat collects leads: yes
Include booking CTA: yes

## TASK
Generate the profile copy. Optimize the hero and CTAs for the goal "sell consulting / freelance services".
Return ONLY valid JSON matching this shape:
{
  "slug": string,
  "hero": { "eyebrow": string, "title": string, "subtitle": string,
            "primaryCta": { "label": string, "kind": "chat"|"booking"|"contact" },
            "secondaryCta": { "label": string, "kind": "chat"|"booking"|"contact" } | null,
            "stats": [{ "label": string, "value": string }] },
  "about": { "heading": string, "body": string },
  "highlights": [{ "label": string, "value": string, "caption": string }],
  "suggestedQuestions": string[],
  "chat": { "greeting": string },
  "booking": { "label": string, "note": string },
  "faq": [{ "q": string, "a": string }]
}
Write all copy in the requested tone. Never invent facts beyond the provided profile.
